---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `./repo-insights.sh ...`
2. See error / unexpected output

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened instead. Include the terminal output if possible.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., macOS 15.0, Ubuntu 24.04, Windows 11 WSL]
- Shell: [e.g., bash 5.2, zsh 5.9]
- `gh --version`: [e.g., gh version 2.40.0]
- `jq --version`: [e.g., jq-1.7]

## Verbose Output

Run with `-v` flag and paste the output:
```
./repo-insights.sh -v -r owner/repo 2>&1
```

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.
